close_reason: Implemented using ureq crate for PyPI JSON API
description:
Query PyPI JSON API to resolve package versions:
- Endpoint: https://pypi.org/pypi/{package}/json (latest)
- Endpoint: https://pypi.org/pypi/{package}/{version}/json (specific)
- Extract download URL for sdist (source distribution)
- Prefer .tar.gz over .zip for consistency
- Handle package name normalization (underscores vs hyphens)
- Cache responses to avoid repeated queries

Note: If requirements.txt has pinned versions, can skip resolution.
title: Implement PyPI API client for version resolution
